analysis: The translation is excellent, providing natural Spanish equivalents for technical concepts (e.g., 'recorrido en profundidad' for DFS). It maintains the MDX structure perfectly. The translator occasionally adds helpful context in the explanations (e.g., Challenge 14) which improves the educational value without drifting from the source meaning.
strengths: Natural use of technical terminology (Pilas, Colas, Montículos, Árboles autoequilibrados).
Consistent translation of Big O notation and complexity terms.
Preservation of all MDX components and props (client:visible, index, group).

issues.note: The 'hints' slots from the source were omitted in the translation.
The intro text contains an empty parenthesis 'algoritmos ()' carried over from the source typo.
